results.title: Soccer-Sweden smash five past Tunisia in World Cup opener
results.description: MONTERREY, Mexico, June 14 (Reuters) - Sweden's Yasin Ayari scored two sensational ⁠goals and Alexander Isak and Viktor Gyokeres also got on the scoresheet as they cruised to a 5-1 World Cup Group F victory over Tunisia ⁠on Sunday.

results.title: Rivian AT&T 5G Deal Puts R2 Software And Valuation In Focus
results.description: Rivian Automotive (NasdaqGS:RIVN) has agreed a major partnership with AT&T to bring dedicated 5G connectivity to its next generation R2 vehicle platform. The collaboration is aimed at supporting software defined features, over the air updates and new connected services for drivers. The 5G rollout is expected to underpin real time AI powered functions and richer infotainment inside future Rivian vehicles. results.title: Boxing Is Love Puts Boxraw Ring in Jamestown’s Wisdom Gym
results.description: NewsGhana, Latest Updates and Breaking News of Ghana, News Ghana, https://www.newsghana.com.gh/boxing-is-love-puts-boxraw-ring-in-jamestowns-wisdom-gym/UK charity Boxing Is Love this week delivered a Boxraw ring and five punching bags to Jamestown’s Wisdom Boxing Gym, backing a refurbishment of one of Accra’s oldest boxing clubs. The equipment, supplied through the British boxing brand Boxraw, forms part of a wider renovation of the gym’s physical structure at Ardebenkpo in Jamestown. results.title: Eric Trump and UFC Controversy: Allegations of Insider Information
results.description: A strange controversy unfolded at UFC Freedom 250, where Eric Trump allegedly sought insider information from UFC commentator Daniel Cormier. The incident began with a now-deleted social media post showing a direct message exchange between the two, raising questions about the integrity of the event. Cormier's strong response and Trump's denial of the allegations added fuel to the fire, leading to widespread speculation online. This incident is just one of many controversies surrounding the UFC event, which has already attracted attention due to its political implications and Trump's financial ties to the UFC. As the situation develops, the authenticity of the messages remains unverified.

results.title: Sweden gets 2 goals from Yasin Ayari and pounds Tunisia 5-1 to move atop World Cup Group F
results.description: Yasin Ayari scored twice and Sweden showed it belonged at the 2026 World Cup, pounding Tunisia 5-1 to move atop Group F. Alexander Isak and Viktor Gyökeres each had a goal and an assist, and Mattias Svanberg also scored for...

results.title: Fifa World Cup Day 4 Wrap: Germany rout Curacao, Japan steal a Dutch draw, and Sweden trounce Tunisia
results.description: Germany thrashed World Cup debutants Curacao 7-1 on Sunday while Japan fought back to grab a 2-2 draw with the Netherlands.
